input.headline: First kiss dates back 21 million years, say scientists

raw.headline: First kiss dates back 21 million years, say scientists

winner: The first kiss was so old, it had its own fossil record—scientists just couldn’t find the lips.

candidates.text: I guess that means my first kiss with that cavewoman was a lot more evolutionary than I thought.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Funny and specific, with a clever twist on evolution and personal history."}

candidates.text: Scientists just discovered that the first kiss happened 21 million years ago—turns out dinosaurs were way more romantic than we thought. Now I’m worried about my own dating life; if I can’t even get a 'hello' from a T-Rex, what hope do I have with modern men?
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with dinosaurs, specific reference to T-Rex, and relatable self-deprecating humor about dating life."}
